label: Resident

name: Doug Boling
review:
I first found this place while searching for a place to have a quick, cold afternoon cocktail on a hot summer day while my wife was rehearsing for a concert at a nearby church. The owner/manager and I struck up a conversation that ended up stretching into a languorous hour of sharing personal histories. This was one of my favorite memories of my time in Venice.

Later, I returned with my wife and had a lovely dinner here. The mussels gondolieri were especially good (and we can be snobby about mussels), and the tomato broth was perfect for dipping a piece of their nearly perfect house-made bread. The pasta is made in-house, also, and was delicious. We both had a daily special - my wife, the gnocchi neri with mini scallops, and me, the crab tagliatelle. The food is well-made in a simple, unpretentious way.

But the really special part about our visit was our broad-ranging and warm conversation with the restaurant's owner. He welcomed us like long lost family. The staff were similarly welcoming and responsive. Recommend if you want to get away from the crush of the eateries closer to the docks and San Marco's square and have an excellent, handmade, no-fuss meal with warm, inviting restaurant staff.
label: Resident

name: James Inskip
review: A fantastic gastronomic experience. The food was fantastic, the staff were great and the ambience was relaxing. Beef tartare mixed at the table with a choice of ingredients, large plate of seafood and a unique lasagna with depths of flavour. Not cheap but worth every penny, great birthday treat.
label: Resident

name: satsuki
review:
A very mixed review from someone who has stayed with the hotel. The breakfast and room service was wonderful. Both pastas on the lunch and dinner menu were great. (Tomato sauce with spaghetti and clam sauce pasta) the service was constantly over the expectation and wonderful.

And so we thought dinner would be just as amazing as well. We tried the full course dinner menu the last night we were in Venice and it was terrible. I¡¯m so sorry to say it but maybe because we have high standards for fish?? But everything that was fish related, almost inedible. We didn¡¯t even take pictures of it and also had to leave the food it was so bad. We went out to have more food as we weren¡¯t even full after the meal. I hope it¡¯s a one off thing as it seems the normal reviews seems to be high but we were very disappointed at the meal. But to end of a high note, the service was impeccable. Very friendly and attentive staff all around.

(First picture is the room service tomato pasta, and the second is the avocado toast for breakfast. Breakfast was wonderful)
label: Resident

name: Justin
review:
A wonderful restaurant near the train station.

What can i say but a pleasure to have had to chance to visit. As a michelin Guide restaurant, it definitely lives up.

While everything deserves a mention, i would be remiss if i don't gush over the tiramisu. Every italian restaurant has their own takes on the tiramisu, from traditional to the abstract. For dama, i can say it is the best tiramisu i had in the last 10 italian restaurants. I've been in italy. That should say enough. A strong recommendation for anyone who has a pleasure to visit!
label: Resident

name: Andrew Lawler
review: Delicious 5-course lunch menu with a wine pairing here while we were visiting Venice. Excellent service and they answered all questions we had about the food and wine. The chef also came out to us after the meal. We loved the amuse bouche and the wooden block presentation too!
label: Resident

name: alexandra s
review: We had a very nice dinner and we tryed the degustation menu with 5 dishes. We were very impressed about the food, all the dishes except the desert were all based on fish. Very creative and yummy, interesting tastes. I totally recommend this restaurant. Must try!! The ambiance, the service and food was amazing. Thank you for the experience ?
label: Resident

name: Sasa Zagorc
review: Besides top-notch preparation of dishes and lovely and tranquil ambient on a quiet evening, I want to highlight the mastery of the amazing waiter/sommelier that covered all tables with ease in several languages.
label: Resident

name: Laura
review:
The pasta was quite tasty, the portions may have looked a bit small, but you can easily get full by it. Pasta is very fresh, because they make ir right after you order it, and you can even watch how they are making your pasta.
There is a daily special, which is a little cheaper than if you take the same thing, but without calling it a daily special. There is an opportunity to choose what type of pasta you want if you don't take the daily special. There are also toppings that you want to put on the pasta, which are up to 1 euro in addition to the price. For the pasta that is in the photograph, 7.5 + 0.5 for extra cheese was paid.
The service was very smooth and relatively fast.
You just have to take into account that they give you takeaway food and that in Venice there are some problems with finding a place to eat, especially during the hot summer hours. But in the cafe itself there is a table available where you can stand, but you have to know that there is quite a bit of space and that it may not be the best choice if you go during the most popular hours.
label: Resident

name: Wiebke B.
review:
My fianc¨¦ surprised me with a dinner at the Palais Royal to celebrate our engagement.

We had a beautiful evening at the restaurant, enjoying outstanding food and attentive service. Each course was creative and combining French techniques with Greek/Italian cuisine. We loved every minutes of it and highly recommend.

The first star is more than well deserved and the second star should follow soon ?
label: Resident

name: Michael Friedrich
review: It¡¯s a hidden gem - we¡¯ve been to a lot of Michelin star restaurants and I chose this for our engagement dinner! Fantastic service and food, surely on the rise to a second star. Wish them that more food enthusiasts discover the place! Only thing to consider might be the speed of serving, would have loved a short break somewhere but otherwise a full excellent experience with a great team! All the best!!
label: Resident

name: Sean M
review: Excellent meal and time. Service was next level and the food was both delicious and unpretentious.
label: Resident

name: Andrew Barrett
review: A culinary legend in the making. Hardly anyone knows about this fine dining masterpiece, but things will probably change soon. A French/Mediterranean fusion that bursts with flavor, color, and ingenuity. One of the best meals I had in Italy. Thank you to the staff for being so attentive and answering all my questions about each dish. Best of luck to you all. Michelin stardom awaits.
label: Resident

name: Berk ?olak
review:
Where to start¡­ the food, the team, the ambiance.

Mr. A. Biancotto really knows how to run the place. Every detail was right, communication was superb, and the food was extraordinary. The synergy between service and kitchen was amazing. This is not a 1-star restaurant, it¡¯s better.

In short, I¡¯ll be back next year not if, but when they reach the two stars.
label: Resident

name: Florian Groux
review:
The room is beautiful and must be quite fun when the restaurant gets busy in high season.
We had The Palais Royal menu (portions are generous), the starters (tartelette) and the veal are amazing, everything is well executed. Cinnamon bite for desert is unique!
Staff was knowledgeable, warm and efficient, we had a lovely night - thank you.
(Didn¡¯t order wine)
label: Resident

name: Monserrath Flores
review:
So good!! We got the beef samosas, chicken tikka masala, rice, garlic + cheese naan and salad (which is more like raw veggies)

Everything was so good! The cheese naan so yummy and the chicken tikka masala. I will definitely return if I come back to Venice!
label: Resident

name: Dominique Dirks
review:
What an absolute gem of a restaurant! The flavours were out of this world ¨C every bite was rich, authentic, and perfectly balanced. The service was just as impressive: warm, attentive, and genuinely friendly, making the whole experience even better. And the portions? Generous without compromising on quality ¨C you¡¯ll definitely leave satisfied!

This place is a must-visit if you love Indian food. I can¡¯t wait to come back!
label: Resident

name: pradstar P
review: The food at Ital India was delicious.  The flavours of the spices was authentic.  And one of the best Indian restaurant I've eaten at.  The decor of the restaurant is very nice. Staff are also friendly.  I would recommend eating here if your into Indian food.
label: Resident

name: Helene Rosalie Jordan
review: Amazing  culinary experience.  Food was TOPS, service and atmosphere excellent.  Abundant portions, all delicious.  Definitely would return!
label: Resident

name: Sravya Garimella
review: Great food! Very authentic and yummy! Portion sizes and prices are very reasonable. Great service and good atmosphere - seating available inside and outside. Definitely recommend !
label: Resident

name: Aitor Godoy
review:
One of the best Indian restaurants I have ever been to, not only in Italy, but also in India. The butter chicken was our favorite, but everything was so great!
I would recommend it to anyone!
label: Resident

name: Ram Prakash Palaniswamy
review:
We started with the Aloo Tikki (3 small pieces) but too much of chat masala.
For mains, the Karahi Paneer with naan was good;
the naan bread was especially soft and puffy ¨C a solid 5-star!

However, I wouldn't recommend the Vegetable Biryani ¨C the inclusion of what seemed like butter beans was quite unexpected for a biryani.
We finished with a refreshing lime soda.
label: Resident

name: YoungDaddy Lynam
review: If you¡¯re a beer lover, check this place out. The way they take receipt of the Pilsner Urquell is truly fascinating and unique. Alvisa is a tremendous host, super knowledgeable, and willing to answer questions. I would go back to Venice just to drink here again!!
label: Resident

name: Johnny
review:
The QUANTITY of food is HIGHLY questionable. What you see in the photo is 25 eur. Ordered the fish of the day:cod. It was about 150g(?)

It's not lile they don't have fish in the area, come on!!

The white wine (the house wine) was flavoury. Nothing to complain about.

I've requested them to change the order without touching it and was denied.
The waiter had some attitude in him. When hearing my complaints, he continued to say "this is your opinion", instead of just saying "I understand" and to communicate it to the chef or boss.

They were kind to bring extra 2 bread snacks with salmon on top and asparagus creme.

What cost the most was my peace of mind and disposition.
label: Resident

name: Lisandro Perrone
review: Amazing experience. The Cicheti Misti (Italian version of tapas if you like) are thought masterfully. The most interesting plate I¡¯ve taste in Italy so far. Combined with a classic spaghetti mixed in chesse wheel, they make a contrast of modern & classic flavors. The cocktails were also spot on. A hidden gem of Venecia. 1000/10
label: Resident

name: Maria Olex
review: We were disappointed with our visit. The pasta with clams was tasteless, and we felt like we had to force ourselves to eat it. The dish cost 22 euros, but it only had about 10 clams. We definitely won't be coming back, and we wouldn't recommend it to anyone.
label: Resident

name: Maahin Rizvi
review:
I went to this place 4 times within 5 weeks and had the best food every time I went back . The service was amazing and although I cannot remember the name of the gentleman who served me a few times, I felt very welcome being there. The food was 10/10! My favourite was the melanzane. The dishes changed every week and every dish i tried was so fresh and delicious!
I¡¯ve recommended to many people I met in Venice but when I go back I¡¯ll definitely be going back there!
label: Resident

name: Kacper ?wierad
review: The food at Trattoria La Battigia was absolutely phenomenal. This is the kind of place that should be written about in local newspapers, as I truly believe it is by far the most worthwhile restaurant to visit in the entire region. Special attention must be given to the gnocchi in porcini mushroom sauce with scampi. This dish takes you on a culinary journey, culminating in a catharsis for your taste buds. Once is simply not enough ¨C one day, I will return here solely for this restaurant and this extraordinary dish. I wholeheartedly recommend it to everybody.
label: Resident

name: Catalina Dascalu
review: We had a fantastic dinner at Trattoria La Battigia! The gnocchi con porcini e gamberi was full of flavours ¡ª soft, homemade gnocchi with mushrooms and perfectly cooked shrimps. The Tartufo nero was a real highlight ¡ª rich and aromatic without being too much. Friendly staff and a relaxed, local feel. Would definitely come back!
label: Resident

name: Veronika V
review:
Excellent food we had the house plate spagetti with lobster - AMAZING!
recommend to try looked like locals did too
label: Resident

name: Mira Kov¨¢cs
review:
Google maps says they open at 18:30. We showed up exactly at that time. They wouldn¡¯t open for 10 more minutes so we went in and said hi. A woman told us we have to wait until 7pm. So we waited patiently in front of the door. A bit after 7pm, when they still weren¡¯t open, a woman came up to the door and locked it in front of our eyes.
Either update your google maps or don¡¯t give the wrong info to people. Very disrespectful
label: Resident

name: Mr F
review: Just tucked out if the way. The staff spoke better English than me. I wish my italiano was as good. No menu it is just a wonderful little bar.
label: Resident

name: Rachel S
review:
This is honestly the best gluten free pizza I've had in Venice! No way could I tell the difference in pizza base.
The service was attentive, the food came out quickly and was heavenly.
If I had more time in Venice, I would be going back.
The location is perfect. The outside seating was very picturesque and not on the main thoroughfare.
5 stars all round.
label: Resident

name: Mikhail Kazansev
review:
It¡¯s probably the most ¡°italiano vero¡± place I¡¯ve ever visited. Many thanks to the wonderful Marco, who gave us great advice and even helped us improve our Italian. It was a truly fabulous experience.
The food was absolutely delicious, and we had never seen desserts like this before. It was a truly fabulous experience.
label: Resident

name: William Gray
review:
An incredibly-pleasant restaurant that's very close to the main thoroughfare linking the train station with Rialto, yet offers better quality fare and atmosphere compared to the myriad of eateries directly lining the street.

Spent several dinners here, enjoying the excellent service by the staff and the delicious food. Fare is a good mixture of local and national cuisine, with thoughtful portion sizes for the primi and secondi dishes.

The interior dining room is calm and cosy, allowing for a relaxed dining experience. A reliable, quality eatery that you don't need to trek too far off the beaten path for.
label: Resident

name: Robert Artac
review: Cuttlefish ink pasta was good. I wouldn't do it again but has nothing to do with how it was prepared. The pasta was bang-on al dente. Perfectly prepared. Wine selection was excellent. Very kind waiter and loved his impromptu whistling. Overall would definitely go again.
label: Resident

name: marc gregory
review:
This is the place to go!!

I came here because another pizza place wanted reservations.
I AM SO GLAD I ATE HERE!

We had tomato bruschetta, spaghetti with beef ragu, four cheese gnocchi, and diavola pizza.

The bruschetta was so delicious that my daughter cried tears of joy.

All of the food was very fresh and delicious!

The staff was very freindly and knew the menu well. This is worth the walk from anywhere in the area.
label: Resident

name: Dakshan Krishnapalan
review: Stumbled upon this restaurant for breakfast and noticed it had great deals so we gave it a try. They have some of the best deals that I¡¯ve seen, I got a fresh orange juice, croissant sandwich with salami and cheese as well as a cappuccino for 8.50 euro. We were served relatively quickly as well and there was no cover charge! Would go here again for sure!
label: Resident

name: Matthew Urbas
review: We had a nice, and most importantly, cheap (for Venice) dinner here. Whilst it's far from a gastronomical master class, it was quite enjoyable. What more, the server took care and attention to my partners milk allergy, and made sure her food wouldn't me contaminated.
label: Resident

name: Ivette Alejandra
review: Delicious and affordable breakfast. We ate here every day of our stay and had the best waiter - I wish I caught his name but he was super friendly and spoke perfect Spanish. Highly recommend for breakfast.
label: Resident

name: Tammi Van Horn
review: Enjoyed breakfast both days of our stay. Service was very friendly. Food was good, prices are on the menu so definitely not a trap as some have stated. We will definitely enjoy again on our next visit.
label: Resident

name: Wisanu Tuntawiroon
review:
I had the pleasure of visiting **bArCollo** in Venice and was impressed by the warm and friendly atmosphere. The staff were welcoming and attentive, making it an enjoyable experience from the start. The breakfast is simple yet satisfying, with a nice mix of options that suit both traditional tastes and those looking for something more familiar.

I particularly enjoyed the omelette, which was cooked to perfection, along with crispy bacon that added just the right amount of flavor. The fresh orange juice and a good cup of coffee rounded out the meal nicely. If you're looking for a cozy spot with a typical yet delicious breakfast, bArCollo is a great choice.
label: Resident

name: Canice Hong
review: Good and cheap food for the area. I got a carbonara for under 10 which felt insane considering everything nearby was 12-15+. It was delish and they bring a a whole jar of parmesan so you can add as much as you like. The rest of the food also looked good. Nice area by the canals but tucked away in a little court of restaurants so it¡¯s not overlooking a canal. Great spot to people watch. They have only a couple bar spots for indoor seating and the rest is outdoors which was nice on a cool May day.
label: Resident

name: Kellyanne Matt
review:
Most amazing cicchetti and aperol spritz
The prawns are so fresh and delicious. The bruschetta is amazing. The mozzarella incredible. The speck was delicious. The cannoli the kids went mad for them !  Just is such a lovely little Hidden gem in Venice. Wonderful staff. Amazing food!
We came one day in the morning and absolutely loved it so we came back in the evening the next day
label: Resident

name: Sara Fischer
review: Overall, meh. Bread was very fresh. Cannelloni was alright and served in a weird white sauce. Should have been in a pomodoro sauce or alfredo. We also ordered breaded fish and fries. Fries were good. Fish looked like it was out of the box. Waiter was a bit lax, so had to go to the bar to get my own ice. Overall, edible and cheap.
label: Resident

name: EJ Judd
review: Straight 5 stars. The food and wine were spectacular but so were the lovely staff that truly brought my last dinner in Venezia to a 12/10 experience. From a wonderful wine recommendation to a peak of the canal from the dock this was truly phenomenal. (Also, seemingly less expensive than dinner on the squares, but far better food and experience!)
label: Resident

name: Raul Diaz
review: Excellent food great taste very well presented great service.
label: Resident

name: Jill Moran
review: Had an amazing time!  Delicious food that was specially fashioned to accommodate vegetarian by very talented young chef. ?? We had a blast with Michaela (very Roman sense of humor) and will come back again as soon as possible.
label: Resident

name: Rome Batchelor
review:
My wife and I had a fantastic time in our
visit to Venice and one of the highlights was our experience at the Palazzina Restaurant.  The food was fantastic and Mauro was such a joy to converse with. It¡¯s been over a year since then and we still talk about it.  Highly recommend!

Mauro thank you so much!
label: Resident

name: Haris Loutradis
review: Perfect restaurant. Perfect food. Perfect atmosphere! Totally worth the reasonably high price!
label: Resident

name: Alan Howles
review:
Classy, elevated experience with impeccable service. Marco, Ricardo, Filipo and the entire teeam provided exceptional service every time we had dinner there.

Bollinger and a superb Amarone by the glass, a juicy, tender and crispy skinned Patanegra pork entree and an unusual and memorable mille fogilie. What mlre could one ask for?

Highly recommended!
label: Resident

name: K Dawg
review: Michael was spectacular! He delivered one of the most spectacular service performances I have ever witnessed! Knowledgeable, friendly, funny and efficient. He is what service is all about. The food was spectacular but falls short of only the exceptional service my wife and I received. Thank you to the great chef(s) and Michael for memorable experience. I will recommend you to all who come this way to this unbelievable city! Grazie!!!!
label: Resident

name: Christopher Chung
review: Exceptional menu offerings: raw fish trio appetizer and duck tortello were flavorful and modern. Smartly decorated restaurant interior evokes a sense of celebrity, but refined taste. Beautiful bar. A great place to enjoy a special occasion or an elevated experience.
label: Resident

name: Kero Chan
review: Walked in on a weekday afternoon without reservation. Reasonable portions. The pasta was very nice and creamy. The seafood risotto was less overwhelming because the quality and quantity of seafood used was mediocre, did not quite match with its price charged (EUR25). Bread given was also not impressive due to its hard crust. I have had better bread in other restaurants.
label: Resident

review: Garantizado, un restaurante local, no es caro y la comida de lo mejor
label: Resident

name: Ida Boeva
review:
The service is a mess. Two staff members were arguing in front of the hotel when we walked in. The restaurant manager and the severs don't communicate and one says one thing that the other says is not possible. But to be told by the restaurant manager that something is possible only to be told by the waiter that it's not.

Additionally, the servers seem to be in training as there were several mistakes made - brining the wrong beers, spilling wine on the table, forgetting to bring new cutlery after the initial course. For some reason the restaurant manager decided to ocercompensate by brining a whole plate of cutlery - photo attached.

Food was fine. Tiny portions of for the price. The fish had bones left uncleaned. The service was so slow that we had to check in several times. One of the managers did eventually comp some of our drinks.

The bathrooms are... interesting, with the male bathroom doors' locks not fully working.

For such a hotel and expections this experience was very dissapointing. Killed the whole vibe of the evening.

Otherwise the restaurant is beautiful and everything is on theme. I hope this is not the typical experience. I love Hyatt as a chain and their restaurants and service.
label: Resident

name: YoungDaddy Lynam
review: If you¡¯re a beer lover, check this place out. The way they take receipt of the Pilsner Urquell is truly fascinating and unique. Alvisa is a tremendous host, super knowledgeable, and willing to answer questions. I would go back to Venice just to drink here again!!
label: Resident

name: Johnny
review:
The QUANTITY of food is HIGHLY questionable. What you see in the photo is 25 eur. Ordered the fish of the day:cod. It was about 150g(?)

It's not lile they don't have fish in the area, come on!!

The white wine (the house wine) was flavoury. Nothing to complain about.

I've requested them to change the order without touching it and was denied.
The waiter had some attitude in him. When hearing my complaints, he continued to say "this is your opinion", instead of just saying "I understand" and to communicate it to the chef or boss.

They were kind to bring extra 2 bread snacks with salmon on top and asparagus creme.

What cost the most was my peace of mind and disposition.
label: Resident

name: Lisandro Perrone
review: Amazing experience. The Cicheti Misti (Italian version of tapas if you like) are thought masterfully. The most interesting plate I¡¯ve taste in Italy so far. Combined with a classic spaghetti mixed in chesse wheel, they make a contrast of modern & classic flavors. The cocktails were also spot on. A hidden gem of Venecia. 1000/10
label: Resident

name: Maria Olex
review: We were disappointed with our visit. The pasta with clams was tasteless, and we felt like we had to force ourselves to eat it. The dish cost 22 euros, but it only had about 10 clams. We definitely won't be coming back, and we wouldn't recommend it to anyone.
label: Resident

name: Maahin Rizvi
review:
I went to this place 4 times within 5 weeks and had the best food every time I went back . The service was amazing and although I cannot remember the name of the gentleman who served me a few times, I felt very welcome being there. The food was 10/10! My favourite was the melanzane. The dishes changed every week and every dish i tried was so fresh and delicious!
I¡¯ve recommended to many people I met in Venice but when I go back I¡¯ll definitely be going back there!
label: Resident

name: Sara Clark
review: The pizza and beer we ordered here (in September) were delicious! The service was very quick and the food came out quick as well. The wait staff were polite. It's not a huge place so I don't know if it would work for a big group, but up to 4 people is easy to fit. We ate inside as there were no outside tables available. We would recommend for a quick bite while exploring Murano!
label: Resident

name: Blogger Review
review: Squid ink pasta was delicious and not too salty! The server was also friendly and did not impose cover charge for my child who was 3 years old.
label: Resident

name: Javier Sanchez
review: I had an amazing experience at Pizzeria Marlin Ristorante! The food was outstanding¡ªfresh, flavorful, and beautifully presented. The pizza was perfectly baked with a delicious crust, and the ingredients tasted authentic and high-quality. The service was exceptional; the staff were friendly, attentive, and made us feel welcome from the moment we walked in. The atmosphere added to the experience, with a cozy and inviting setting that made it a pleasure to dine in. Highly recommend this place for anyone looking to enjoy great Italian food in a charming environment!
label: Resident

name: EJ Judd
review: Straight 5 stars. The food and wine were spectacular but so were the lovely staff that truly brought my last dinner in Venezia to a 12/10 experience. From a wonderful wine recommendation to a peak of the canal from the dock this was truly phenomenal. (Also, seemingly less expensive than dinner on the squares, but far better food and experience!)
label: Resident

review: Excellent food great taste very well presented great service.
label: Resident

review: Had an amazing time!  Delicious food that was specially fashioned to accommodate vegetarian by very talented young chef. ?? We had a blast with Michaela (very Roman sense of humor) and will come back again as soon as possible.

review:

visit to Venice and one of the highlights was our experience at the Palazzina Restaurant.  The food was fantastic and Mauro was such a joy to converse with. It¡¯s been over a year since then and we still talk about it.  Highly recommend!

Mauro thank you so much!
